programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: During 'Bring Your Brother to Work Day' in Thousand Oaks, California, Justin sinks his money into a unit with an interesting pair. Dave pushes Mary to the breaking point.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In Arkansas, Frank and Danielle pick a former trading post that's packed with awesome Americana; Dr Smith's family hospital has been shuttered for decades and it's filled with vintage medical curios; Cotton's roadside home looks like a rad junk shop but he's determined to hold on to every single piece.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A 1923 Babe Ruth baseball card, graded a perfect 10, steps up to the plate. An autographed jersey of famed New York Yankees icon Lou Gehrig.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: In the Australian outback, when the going gets tough, the tough drive trucks. Outback truckers drive the biggest trucks on Earth along the toughest roads and loneliest highways.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: In the Australian outback, when the going gets tough, the tough drive trucks. Outback truckers drive the biggest trucks on Earth along the toughest roads and loneliest highways.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Rich runs his hunting dogs through a gauntlet of tests to determine which will become the new leader of the pack. Marty sets out on foot to cut a new trap line and salvage his season.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Rick and his crew face a tough trek when a 1972 Honda ATC motors into the shop. Later, Ron and Tyler are up to no good as they plan Rick's bachelor bash.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: And Mary Ran Away With the Spoon
programme.desc: In Huntington Beach, California, Darrell's insider information amplifies his investment considerably. Mary's find cooks up some oversized accoutrements.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In Arkansas, Mike tries to keep a poker face while bidding on a 1944 Knucklehead Harley. Later, a random freestyle stop leads to a mega pick honey hole. Back in Iowa, Danielle gets fired up over a gun appraisal.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars travel the universe, as a car filled with Star Trek autographed memorabilia makes the guys dress up in their spacesuits, and Corey is forced to watch Star Wars.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Alcohol and testosterone can be an explosive combination and sure enough, things get well out of hand when a group of men gather to mourn their dead mate.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A man does a runner from the scene of a crash and when officers find him, it becomes clear why he wanted to evade police. Then, police spot a car with stolen plates.

programme.title: The Force - Behind the Line
programme.desc: A neighbour at flashpoint with a young officer caught in the middle, the mysterious disappearance of an elderly lady and a family home hides an arsenal of weapons. Hosted by Simon Reeve.

programme.title: The Force - Behind the Line
programme.desc: A dangerous thief won't come easily for police while a unlicensed driver is worried about what will happen to his passengers, tonight on THE FORCE: BEHIND THE LINE. Hosted by SIMON REEVE.

programme.title: Caught On Dashcam
programme.desc: From blockbuster smashes and explosive road rage, to crazy police chases and thieving animals - it's all caught on camera in the epic series finale!

programme.title: World's Wildest Police Videos
programme.desc: Israeli guards take on a terrorist in a vicious alleyway shootout, a half-naked junkie swipes a police SUV and tears up traffic, and a stir-crazy prisoner takes a head-first dive from his top bunk into his toilet!

programme.title: World's Wildest Police Videos
programme.desc: This episode features the wildest roadside stops caught on camera.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Rick and his crew face a tough trek when a 1972 Honda ATC motors into the shop. Later, Ron and Tyler are up to no good as they plan Rick's bachelor bash.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: And Mary Ran Away With the Spoon
programme.desc: In Huntington Beach, California, Darrell's insider information amplifies his investment considerably. Mary's find cooks up some oversized accoutrements.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In Arkansas, Mike tries to keep a poker face while bidding on a 1944 Knucklehead Harley. Later, a random freestyle stop leads to a mega pick honey hole. Back in Iowa, Danielle gets fired up over a gun appraisal.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars travel the universe, as a car filled with Star Trek autographed memorabilia makes the guys dress up in their spacesuits, and Corey is forced to watch Star Wars.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A man does a runner from the scene of a crash and when officers find him, it becomes clear why he wanted to evade police. Then, police spot a car with stolen plates.

programme.title: World's Wildest Police Videos
programme.desc: Israeli guards take on a terrorist in a vicious alleyway shootout, a half-naked junkie swipes a police SUV and tears up traffic, and a stir-crazy prisoner takes a head-first dive from his top bunk into his toilet!

programme.title: Kings Of Pain
programme.desc: Aussie wildlife biologist Adam and professional animal handler Caveman Rob head to Bali to test the Rove Beetle, and then the Fire Urchin.

programme.title: Mark Berg's Fishing Addiction
programme.desc: The team surprise builder Brad Kearns from Sydney with a trip to New Zealand to chase monster kingfish and snapper.

programme.title: Merv Hughes Fishing
programme.desc: Come fishing with Merv Hughes on some great fishing adventures. It's a lighthearted fishing show with some ripping catches.

programme.title: Creek to Coast
programme.desc: Discover the Scenic Rim. Olivia joins the OzFish team in WA. A Tamborine campsite to put on the list. Gear up and tackle a few top end barra for yourself or hook a barra straight from the Daintree.

programme.title: Caught On Dashcam
programme.desc: From blockbuster smashes and explosive road rage, to crazy police chases and thieving animals - it's all caught on camera in the epic series finale!

programme.title: Supercars Highlights
programme.desc: Catch all the highlights of the historic first for Supercars in the NZ South Island and Christchurch at Ruapuna Raceway.

programme.title: Blokesworld
programme.desc: Ado and Camera 3 make their way to Dollywood, stop in to do a lap of Bristol Speedway, and check out Thunder Valley. Just another typical day in the South with guns, barbecue and moonshine.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Rick and his crew face a tough trek when a 1972 Honda ATC motors into the shop. Later, Ron and Tyler are up to no good as they plan Rick's bachelor bash.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: And Mary Ran Away With the Spoon
programme.desc: In Huntington Beach, California, Darrell's insider information amplifies his investment considerably. Mary's find cooks up some oversized accoutrements.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In Arkansas, Mike tries to keep a poker face while bidding on a 1944 Knucklehead Harley. Later, a random freestyle stop leads to a mega pick honey hole. Back in Iowa, Danielle gets fired up over a gun appraisal.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars travel the universe, as a car filled with Star Trek autographed memorabilia makes the guys dress up in their spacesuits, and Corey is forced to watch Star Wars.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Alcohol and testosterone can be an explosive combination and sure enough, things get well out of hand when a group of men gather to mourn their dead mate.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A man does a runner from the scene of a crash and when officers find him, it becomes clear why he wanted to evade police. Then, police spot a car with stolen plates.

programme.title: The Force - Behind the Line
programme.desc: A neighbour at flashpoint with a young officer caught in the middle, the mysterious disappearance of an elderly lady and a family home hides an arsenal of weapons. Hosted by Simon Reeve.

programme.title: The Force - Behind the Line
programme.desc: A dangerous thief won't come easily for police while a unlicensed driver is worried about what will happen to his passengers, tonight on THE FORCE: BEHIND THE LINE. Hosted by SIMON REEVE.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Rich must defend his home from a mountain lion that has invaded his turf. A voracious wolverine threatens to derail Marty's season for good. Eustace puts his wood burning truck to the ultimate test.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: After a 1900s signal cannon bursts into the shop, Rick prepares for the big boom. Later, the shop says \.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: Indiana Ivy and the Temple of Phlegm
programme.desc: Darrell is at risk of losing the title of 'The King of Montebello'. Brandi and Jarrod find their way back to the auction with the help of some pocket tech.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In an awesome Arkansas auction hall, Mike does business with a fast-talking taxidermy deer; in a ghost town full of empty storefronts, the guys pick an old school general store that's packed with merchandise; combing through a massive toy collection, Mike spies a retro billboard that could be worth a bundle.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Grab a ringside seat when the team square off for memorabilia from undefeated boxing champ Rocky Marciano.

programme.title: AFL
programme.desc: The Bulldogs go head-to-head with the Swans, live and free from Marvel Stadium. Bounce time: 7:30 pm AEST.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A hit-and-run driver is found at home, but he's drugged and angry and not going to come easily. Officers try to stop a speeding biker who runs the orange light, but he's gapped it.

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: A drugged driver on the North Western is about to pass out. A bike gets t-boned, but who's to blame? When totalling your van means you've lost your home as well.

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent
programme.desc: Join superstar judges Simon Cowell, Amanda Holden, Alesha Dixon and KSI as they search for golden-buzzer worthy talent.

programme.title: Unbelievable Moments Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Incredible clips of eyewitness footage shot by members of the public.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: Jake Blues reunites with his brother Elwood to reform their old R&B band and save their childhood Catholic home, while evading the police in Chicago.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In an awesome Arkansas auction hall, Mike does business with a fast-talking taxidermy deer; in a ghost town full of empty storefronts, the guys pick an old school general store that's packed with merchandise; combing through a massive toy collection, Mike spies a retro billboard that could be worth a bundle.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Grab a ringside seat when the team square off for memorabilia from undefeated boxing champ Rocky Marciano.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Get paranormal with the team when two first editions of A Christmas Carol appear in the shop.

programme.title: The Front Bar
programme.desc: Join Sam Pang, Mick Molloy and Andy Maher as they share a laugh about the world of AFL and catch up with stars of yesteryear and today.

programme.title: Kings Of Pain
programme.desc: The guys encounter two creatures of the Amazon: The Paraponera clavata aka The Bullet Ant, and the Red-Bellied Piranha.

programme.title: Mark Berg's Fishing Addiction
programme.desc: Our winner Brad Kearns has knocked two species off the Daiwa challenge and just needs to catch a snapper of 5kg to take home the gear. Stay tuned as this one comes down to the wire.

programme.title: Merv Hughes Fishing
programme.desc: Come fishing with Merv Hughes on some great fishing adventures. It's a lighthearted fishing show with some ripping catches.

programme.title: Creek to Coast
programme.desc: Liz is fishing with first time anglers on the Sunny Coast. Gary gives his old boat trailer a refurb. Ben cooks up a seafood paella. Scott is in Tassie checking out the local crustaceans.

programme.title: Seven's Motorsport Classic
programme.desc: In this episode of 7's Motorsport Classics, we delve into the archives to celebrate three of Nissan's best wins in the history of the Australian Touring Car and Supercars Championship.

programme.title: Seven's Motorsport Classic
programme.desc: In this episode of 7's Motorsport Classics, we re-live the breakthrough wins of three of Supercars modern stars - Will Davison, James Courtney & David Reynolds.

programme.title: Supercars Highlights
programme.desc: Catch all the highlights of the historic first for Supercars in the NZ South Island and Christchurch at Ruapuna Raceway.

programme.title: NFL
programme.desc: Live coverage of the 2026 NFL Draft from Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania.
